PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, TIAN LANG LEI, CAROL WU, LI CHEN LOUIE, MAY HUANG, SHUN SUAN LEE, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAIRA, GURBAKSH KHAIRA, JAGMOHAN $15,173.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,173.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFFS: $1444.00 TO TIAN LANG LEI; $2203.00 TO CAROL LEI; $2796.00 TO LI CHEN WU; $4815.00 TO SHUN XUAN HUANG; $3915.00 TO MAY LOUIE; AND -0- TO KYLE LEE. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, TIAN LANG LEI, CAROL WU, LI CHEN LOUIE, MAY HUANG, SHUN SUAN AS TO DEFENDANT KHAIRA, GURBAKSH KHAIRA, JAGMOHAN
